h211118f6g9ce1g4e89ga369g3f4a16041b4b: Must we stoop to tell every roadside cur of what we're about?
h35494e5cgeb13g4546g832bg5ffa843fb6b1: Not every cur, I suppose. It won't happen again.
hce89bb55g5400g460cg9cb4g136354f9256f: Somehow, I'm actually inclined to believe you.
h1fa3745eg8713g496fg941ag3673babd8029: Now let us make haste to a crèche. Neither Nettie nor Halsin holds the cure we seek.
hbb39c69dgf6b9g4844gab4agc25856d09acb: It'll be a little hard to find help if we keep our problem a secret.
h3894b354g9263g4548g8b4dg3a4b48804e78: Yet this is the fruit that your honesty bore.
hd93398a6g373cg4dc3g8a27gc1e01ec771bd: Yet this is the fruit that honesty has borne.
h5dbb2301g9987g42ddgac96g953d576dc4b3: Do you intend to question every decision I make?
h7f2c20fdg2f39g4026g8158gcc95d1f5e747: Only the poor ones. Which will be most, I'm assuming.
h83c8b306gd054g40c0g8329g39bf5686b18f: Do you intend to question every decision your fellow travellers make?
